# Label Aarfa

> Label Aarfa is an Indian women's ethnic-wear couture house founded in 2019, operating from a small atelier in New Delhi. The brand specialises in handcrafted kurtas, coord sets, stitched suits, and Pakistani-inspired cordsets — made in small batches with handloom cottons, soft crepes, viscose muslins, pashminas, and silks. Garments are designed for everyday luxury, festive wear, and modern workwear, finished by hand and shipped across India and worldwide. Prices range ₹1,499 – ₹3,499 INR.

## Brand
- Name: Label Aarfa
- Tagline: Fashion Redefined
- Founded: 2019
- Founder: Aarfa
- Atelier: New Delhi, India
- Hours: Monday – Saturday, 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM IST
- Contact: care@labelaarfa.com

## Collections
- [New Arrivals](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/new-arrivals): Latest pieces from the atelier — fresh prints, new silhouettes, seasonal palettes.
- [Stitched Collection](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/stitched): Ready-to-wear suits and kurta sets, fully stitched and finished by hand.
- [Coord Sets](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/coords): Matching kurta-and-palazzo or kurta-and-pant sets in coordinated fabrics and prints.
- [Sale](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/sale): Selected pieces at gentle prices.
- [All Products](https://www.labelaarfa.com/collections/all): The complete current catalogue.

## About
- [Our Story](https://www.labelaarfa.com/about): Founded in 2019 by Aarfa, a Delhi-based designer who set out to make ethnic wear that feels personal and considered. Every garment is finished by hand in the atelier; the house works with master artisans across Jaipur, Delhi, and Lucknow to keep handloom and embroidery traditions alive.
- [Contact](https://www.labelaarfa.com/contact): Write to care@labelaarfa.com.

## Policies
- Free shipping on orders above ₹2,999 within India.
- 24-hour size-exchange window from delivery. Items must be unused, unworn, unwashed, with tags and original packaging. Unboxing video required. ₹350 shipping fee. We do not offer returns or refunds.
- Dispatch within 2 business days. India delivery: 4–7 days. International: 7–14 days.
- Multi-currency display: INR, USD, GBP, EUR, AED, CAD, AUD.

## Optional
- [Sustainability](https://www.labelaarfa.com/about): Small batches, considered fabrics, and slow production — designed to be worn often and kept for years.
